source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A rocket moves with a speed of 0.60c and forms an angle of $45^{\circ}$ with respect to the x-axis, as determined by an observer O. What is the velocity of the rocket as determined by a second observer O′ moving with a speed of 0.80c along the common x–x′-axis with respect to the observer O?
